linting.notes: Pre-commit hooks run all linters. CI uses 'pre-commit run --all-files' as the primary gating check.

testing.fixtures_location: Tests download CRDs dynamically from upstream (RayCluster, Route)
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest for in-memory Kubernetes API server
testing.notes: Unit tests require envtest binaries (etcd, kube-apiserver). Component tests use Ginkgo CLI. E2E tests require a real Kubernetes cluster and are skipped in basic container validation.

ci.notes: CI runs in quay.io/opendatahub/pre-commit-go-toolchain:v0.2 container. E2E tests require Kubernetes cluster setup.

build.notes: Build creates bin/manager binary. Container build uses multi-stage Dockerfile with UBI8 base and Go 1.23.

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo-style: Describe/Context/It blocks for component tests, Test* functions for unit tests
conventions.import_style: Organized using openshift-goimports (stdlib, external, local groups)
conventions.notes: Go version 1.23.0 specified in go.mod. Uses controller-runtime patterns for Kubernetes operators.

test_commands.notes: Requires envtest binaries (etcd, kube-apiserver) which failed to download: '401 Unauthorized' from GCS. Test infrastructure is properly configured but needs special setup.
Same envtest requirement as unit tests. Uses Ginkgo runner.

container_recipe.notes: Tests require Kubernetes control plane binaries from envtest. The setup-envtest tool attempts to download these but fails in standard containers due to GCS authentication issues. A full validation requires either: (1) pre-installed envtest binaries, (2) the quay.io/opendatahub/pre-commit-go-toolchain:v0.2 container image used in CI, or (3) access to download from GCS.

results.notes: Test infrastructure requires envtest binaries which could not be downloaded. Tests would run in the proper CI container (quay.io/opendatahub/pre-commit-go-toolchain:v0.2).

validation.summary: Linting fully validated (fmt, vet, golangci-lint all pass). Tests require envtest setup which failed in standard golang container but works in CI.

gaps: Unit and component tests require envtest binaries (Kubernetes control plane) which are not available in standard containers without special setup
E2E tests require a real Kubernetes cluster and cannot be validated in a container
The setup-envtest tool fails to download binaries due to GCS authentication (401 error)
Pre-commit hooks require pre-commit tool installation which adds Python dependency
No coverage threshold configured - tests generate coverage but no enforcement
